dict.key: Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency

array.string: git mv api.py delrp.py merge_csv.py reprocess* validate_consumption.py tis
echo 'Finneytown Local School District|Finneytown High School|*' > tmp/test-meters.txt
echo 'Finneytown Local School District|Finneytown High School|*' > test-meters.txt
echo 'Trane Company White Bear Lake MN|Trane White Bear Lk MN Corp Fac - SC|*' >> test-meters.txt
for fn in *.log; do grep 'api.py.*response' $fn| wc; done
for fn in *.log; do echo in "$fn: "; grep 'api.py.*response' $fn| wc; done
for fn in *.log; do echo -n "$fn: "; grep 'api.py.*response' $fn| wc; done
for fn in *.log; do printf "%-20s" "$fn:"; grep 'api.py.*response' $fn| wc; done
TZ=UTC JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/jdk1.8.0_231.jdk/Contents/Home gradle clean build -x test -x itest
for n in {01..32}; do sudo echo -n "$n "; cat baselineActualFiltered.json | jq '.tisObjectDataList[0].columns[0].values[]|select(.timestamp[0:10] == "2020-03-'${n}'").value' | add; done
for n in {01..32}; do sudo echo -n "$n "; cat baselineActualFiltered.json | jq '.tisObjectDataList[0].columns[0].values[]|select(.timestamp[0:10] == "2020-03-'${n}'").value' | add; done
pip3 install --user awscli pyperclip requests httpie boto3 colorama tabulate aws-requests-auth
